tweets.text:
SCOOP: An illegal immigrant released into the country under the Biden admin was accused of raping a 12-year-old girl in Missouri, resulting in her pregnancy.

Investigators said Colombian national Brayanne Escobar-Guarnizo even admitted to a detective that “we only had sex one time” and acknowledged possessing nude images of the young victim on his phone.

Authorities arrested Escobar-Guarnizo in Greene County, Missouri, in 2024 after the child’s mother contacted law enforcement upon discovering her daughter was pregnant.

https://t.co/2CSPhJ7fPW

tweets.text:
NEW: A three-time deported illegal immigrant from Honduras is accused of beating a man unconscious and then dragging him behind a dumpster and raping him while he was incapacitated in Suffolk County, New York, @ICEgov announces.

US Marshals arrested Jose Ignacio Bonilla-Garcia, 32, on April 4 near Richmond, TX, as he was allegedly attempting to flee to Mexico.

ICE has since lodged a detainer with the Fort Bend County Jail.

Bonilla-Garcia entered the U.S. illegally at least four times and was removed three times in 2020 under Title 42. He then snuck into the country as a gotaway, marking his fourth border crossing.
